testcase.name: excludes system fields from visible entities
excludes discarded fields
includes searchable fields list
marks editable vs readOnly correctly
includes process actions
handles empty schema
handles multiple entities
entity with only system fields produces empty fields array but entity key exists
entity with all discarded fields produces empty fields array
field with unknown visibility (e.g. hidden) is included in fields
process with no trigger produces action with undefined endpoint and method
schema with null entities does not crash and returns empty visibleEntities
schema with undefined entities does not crash and returns empty visibleEntities
rules parameter is passed but unused — no side effects on output
searchable system field does not appear in searchableFields
field without label has undefined label in output
system-columns.json is valid JSON with expected keys
ad-reference-map.json maps AD_Reference_IDs to schema types
impact-messages.json has entries for each system category
createDbPool returns a pool with query method
createDbPool reads from env when no config provided
classifies AD_Client_ID as system/internal with fromConfig derivation
classifies Created as system/audit
classifies hidden field (isDisplayed=N) as system
classifies read-only field as readOnly
classifies normal displayed field as editable
classifies primary key (C_Order_ID on table C_Order) as system/internal with sequence
parses @AD_Org_ID@ as fromConfig
parses @SQL=SELECT... as lookup
returns null for null input
returns null for undefined input
parses plain value as computed
produces correct window name, 2 entities, and header/line levels
maps AD_Reference_ID correctly (ref 12 -> amount, ref 29 -> quantity)
returns empty schema for empty rows
detects setValue effects from addResult pattern
detects DML usage with OBDal.getInstance()
counts branches (if, switch, ternary)
handles null source gracefully with low confidence
handles undefined source gracefully with low confidence
counts LOC correctly (excludes blanks and comments)
translates @DocumentStatus@ to documentStatus
translates @IsSalesTransaction@='Y' to include true
rejects OB.Utilities framework calls
replaces | with || and & with &&
replaces single = with == but preserves !=, <=, >=
returns true for simple WHERE clause
returns false for complex query with multiple JOINs and EXISTS
returns true for null/empty SQL
returns false for UNION queries
builds a rule with effects from source analysis
builds a rule with unknown complexity when source not found
marks high complexity for DML usage
schema with no system fields produces empty eventHandlers
schema with no processes produces empty processes array
schema with no processes and undefined produces empty processes array
schema with multiple entities produces DTOs for each entity
schema with multiple entities produces endpoints for each entity
schema with multiple entities produces event handlers only for entities with derivations
DTOs for multi-entity schema exclude system fields from each entity
Java type mapping covers all known types correctly
PascalCase class name generation handles hyphenated and underscored names
validators are empty when no processes have preconditions
readOnly fields are marked as readOnly in DTO
discarded fields are excluded from DTOs
generates only base files when no handlers, processes, validators exist
generates correct number of files for multi-entity schema
file paths use lowercase hyphenated window name as slug
file paths contain correct package directory structure
UUID is idempotent across multiple calls with same manifest
same key name under different entity types gets different UUIDs
pre-populated manifest preserves existing UUIDs
UUID format is exactly 32 uppercase hex characters
creates event handler data from system field derivations
creates process data with preconditions
creates DTO data with only visible fields
creates endpoint data with searchable filters
produces a list of files to generate
excludes system fields
includes searchable fields list
maps types to TypeScript types
includes all fields including system
generates REST endpoints
generates process endpoints
generates field-presence tests for visible fields
generates field-type tests
generates searchable-filter tests
generates process tests (happy, failure, edge)
generates system-field tests
generates rule tests
includes test count summary
schema with zero entities produces empty contract
entity with ALL system fields produces empty fields array
discarded fields are excluded from frontend contract
schema with multiple entities includes all entities
computed fields list only includes fields with derivation
maps unknown type to string fallback
schema with zero entities produces empty endpoints
generates exactly 5 REST endpoints per entity
includes discarded fields in backend contract (all fields included)
defaults to empty rules and processes when not provided
multiple entities produce endpoints for all entities
process endpoint includes step count and preconditions
empty schema produces minimal manifest with zero tests
process without edge cases generates no process-edge tests
non-transactional process omits rollback test
rules with tier=human and decision=omit still appear in rule-declared tests (no filtering)
summary.byRunner counts match actual tests by runner
summary.byCategory counts match actual tests by category
all test IDs are unique
all-system-fields entity produces only system-field tests and a visibility test
returns version from schema
defaults version to 0.1.0 when schema has no version
includes generatedAt as ISO timestamp
includes checksum as 16-char hex string
checksum changes when schema content changes
includes frontendContract, backendContract, and testManifest
empty schema produces valid contract structure
generates thin component importing from contract-ui
declares columns array with correct entries
declares filters array from searchableFields
passes columns and filters as props to DataTable
does NOT contain inline CSS classes (moved to generic components)
does NOT contain inline state management
generates thin component importing from contract-ui
declares fields array with only editable fields
includes required flag on required fields
includes labels for editable fields
does NOT contain inline CSS classes or layout
generates search type for search-mode FK fields with reference
generates selector type for selector-mode FK fields
generates dependent type for dependent-mode FK fields
does not render save/delete buttons or process actions
generates thin component importing from contract-ui
does NOT import useEntity or useState directly
declares summary array from read-only fields (excluding status)
declares statusField string
declares processes array with style flags
includes reference in addLineFields entry for FK fields
includes selector type for selector FK fields in addLineFields
declares addLineFields with entry and derived arrays
passes all config props to MasterDetailPage including catalogs
imports mockCatalogs and child components
does NOT contain inline layout CSS (moved to generic components)
passes entityLabel and detailLabel props
generates entry point with standard props
imports page component for header-detail entity
handles single-entity without page component
mapFieldType returns boolean for boolean fields in table columns
mapFormFieldType returns checkbox for boolean fields in form
excludes readOnly boolean fields from form (same rule as other readOnly fields)
returns map of filename to code
generates mockCatalogs.js
all generated files import from contract-ui (not individual UI components)
handles single-entity contract without detail
generates catalogs for all references in the contract
catalog data has correct structure with id and name
BusinessPartnerLocation items have businessPartnerId for dependent filtering
Tax catalog items have rate property
Product catalog items have price and uomId
exports catalogs as default export
returns only form fields with readOnly visibility
generates sequential document numbers for documentNo
generates sequential document numbers for lineNo-style *No fields
generates business partner names for *Partner* fields
cycles through docStatus values
generates date strings for date fields
generates numeric amounts for amount fields
generates integers for integer type fields
cycles through currency values for *currency* fields
generates warehouse names for *warehouse* fields
generates product names for *product* fields
generates discount between 0 and 25
generates quantity between 1 and 100
generates lineNo as (index+1)*10
generates description phrases for description fields
generates tax names for *tax* fields
defaults to "Sample {fieldName}" for unknown string fields
generates random numbers for generic number type
generates the requested number of records
defaults to 12 records
each record has an id field
all ids are unique
each record has all frontend fields
returns data for all entities
primary entity comes first in keys
generates the requested count per entity
child records reference parent IDs
defaults to 12 records per entity
returns a valid ES module string
contains valid JSON arrays in exports
handles empty array body
handles fields with numeric values
handles double-quoted values
skips objects without a key property
handles source with multiple array definitions
handles files with Table in middle of name
handles .js extension
handles index.js (not .jsx)
handles both old and new being empty
handles multiple simultaneous changes across files
detects component-changed for table when columns stay same but code differs
detects component-changed for form when fields stay same but code differs
detects index file changes
entity extraction works for multi-word filenames
handles file-removed correctly
handles existing log with non-sequential runIds
handles existing log with invalid runId entries
pads runId to 3 digits
run timestamp is valid ISO string
multiple changes in same run share runId and timestamp
handles corrupted JSON file gracefully
creates nested directories if needed
handles empty entries array
handles missing log file
filters entries to only requested window
renders null before/after as dash
handles missing log file
groups multiple entries under same runId
lists multiple windows in run summary
parses columns array from table JSX
parses fields array from form JSX
returns empty array when array name not found
classifies table files
classifies form files
classifies page files
classifies index files
classifies other files
detects new files
detects removed files
detects field type changes in table
detects field additions in form
detects field removals in table
detects page content changes
ignores identical files
creates entries with run metadata
auto-increments runId from existing log
returns single no-changes entry when no changes
entry has all required fields
returns a single no-changes entry when old and new files are identical
creates file if missing
appends to existing file
produces valid markdown with table
handles empty log gracefully
produces valid markdown grouped by run
handles empty log gracefully
accepts valid input with windowId and windowName
rejects missing windowId
rejects missing windowName
rejects empty string windowId as invalid
rejects empty string windowName as invalid
returns all pipeline steps in correct order
each step has name, description, and phase
marks human-decisions as interactive
returns exactly 9 steps
includes generate-frontend step with phase F8
F8 comes after F7 and before F9
all step names are unique
all phase values are unique
interactive step is not the first step
interactive step is not the last step
only human-decisions step is marked interactive
sf-pipeline bin entry points to an existing file
all bin entries that reference existing source files are valid
auto-keeps simple displayLogic
escalates displayLogic with framework calls
auto-keeps simple callout without DML
escalates callout with DML
escalates complex callout with many effects
auto-keeps simple validation
readOnlyLogic behaves like displayLogic for simple expressions
readOnlyLogic with framework calls escalates to human
unknown rule type returns human/pending
undefined rule type returns human/pending
validation with DML escalates to human/pending
callout with exactly 2 effects and low complexity is auto
callout with exactly 3 effects escalates to human
callout with missing effects field does not crash
callout with DML but no dmlWarning still escalates with empty warnings
does not mutate the original rule object
produces correct summary counts
empty rules array returns all-zero summary
preserves original rule properties in output
classifies mixed rule types correctly
is valid against processes.schema.json
defines completeOrder with >= 3 edge cases
defines voidOrder with >= 3 edge cases
all steps use only validate|mutation|forEach types
generates assertions for field-presence tests
generates assertions for field-type tests
generates assertions for system-field tests
generates assertions for searchable-filters tests
skips junit tests (not runnable in Node)
detects missing field as failure
returns summary with pass/fail counts
reports failure for bad contract
empty testManifest produces zero counts
missing testManifest produces zero counts
all junit tests result in all skipped, zero passed
multiple entities have tests across entities work
searchable filter for non-existent endpoint fails gracefully
contract with no frontendContract handles gracefully
unknown test category reports failure with descriptive reason
all schema files are valid JSON Schema
schema-raw requires version, window, entities
step-operation defines validate, mutation, forEach types
EventHandler.java.hbs with empty derivations renders without derivation blocks
EventHandler.java.hbs with checkNull=false omits null guard
DalProcess.java.hbs with empty preconditions renders without precondition checks
DalProcess.java.hbs with empty steps renders without step blocks
DalProcess.java.hbs with all stub=true steps renders only comments, no code
DTO.java.hbs with zero fields renders class with only constructor
RxEndpoint.java.hbs with no filters renders org-level filter only
dataset.xml.hbs with no records renders valid XML shell
PreconditionValidator.java.hbs with empty preconditions renders valid class
EventHandler.java.hbs compiles and generates valid Java
DalProcess.java.hbs generates process with preconditions
DTO.java.hbs generates DTO with fields
RxEndpoint.java.hbs generates endpoint
build.gradle.hbs generates valid gradle
dataset.xml.hbs generates valid XML
ErrorSerializer.java.hbs compiles
PreconditionValidator.java.hbs compiles
computeChecksum produces consistent hex hash
computeChecksum changes when input changes
generateVersion returns semver format
toCamelCase converts column names
generates and returns consistent UUIDs
generates different UUIDs for different keys
loads and saves manifest to file
loadManifest returns empty object for missing file
valid process passes
process without preconditions fails
process with < 3 edge cases fails
step with invalid type fails
forEach without nested steps fails
entity reference check with schema
not transactional fails
duplicate step names fails
non-sequential step order fails
step target referencing unknown entity fails with schema
valid schema passes all levels
L1: missing window.name
L1: duplicate field names
L1: invalid visibility value
L1: missing version
L1: missing entities
L1: duplicate entity names
L1: invalid entity level
L1: errors prevent L2+ from running
L2: primaryEntity references nonexistent entity
L2: FK field without reference
L2: parentEntity references nonexistent entity
L2: parentField missing when parentEntity is set
L3: system field without derivation
L3: system field with searchable=true
L3: system field with grid=true
L3: fromParent derivation on header entity without parent
L3: system field in system-columns.json passes without derivation
L4: searchable field with incompatible type
L4: system field without derivation, default, or rule emits warning
L4: system field with kept rule passes
returns maxLevel=4 when all levels pass
result structure has errors, warnings, maxLevel
